text:
# Document Summary

page_summaries: ```

 • item #1:

# Summary

This is Acme Corporation's Q4 2025 quarterly business performance report showing strong growth across key metrics:

**Key Performance Highlights:**
- Revenue: $159.4M (up 12% YoY)
- Operating margin improved to 23.5% (from 21.2% in Q3)
- Net income: $35.2M (up 23.9%)
- Customer base grew 19.3% to 14,850 customers
- Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR): $648M (up 11.7%)

**Notable Achievements:**
- Launched AcmeCloud Pro platform with 2,400 new enterprise accounts in first 60 days
- Customer retention: 94.2%
- Net Promoter Score: 72 (all-time high)
- Gross margin increased to 69.8%

Growth was driven by enterprise segment expansion, cost optimization, and favorable product mix.

 • item #2:

# Page Summary

This page presents quarterly business performance data for Acme's products:

**Product Performance:**
- **AcmeCloud Pro** (launched Oct 15): Exceeded targets, driven by AI analytics (78% customer adoption driver)
  - Pro tier: $48,000/year average contract value
  - Standard tier: $18,500/year average contract value
- **AcmeDB** (legacy): Stable at $42M/quarter, but slowing new customer growth
  - 340 accounts migrated to AcmeCloud in Q4

**Regional Revenue Breakdown:**
- North America: $89.2M (56%, +8.5% growth)
- Europe: $38.1M (24%, +15.2% growth)
- Asia-Pacific: $22.5M (14%, +22.8% growth)
- Rest of World: $9.6M (6%, +11.1% growth)

**Total Revenue:** ~$159.4M

 • item #3:

# Summary

**Acme Corporation Strategic Outlook - 2026**

**Key Priorities:**
1. Expand AcmeCloud Pro to mid-market with self-serve onboarding
2. Launch AcmeCloud for Government (FedRAMP certification in Q2)
3. Acquire DataSynth Labs to enhance AI capabilities
4. Establish direct sales in Japan and South Korea

**Financial Guidance (FY2026):**
- Revenue: $700-720M (10-13% YoY growth)
- Operating margins: 25-26%
- R&D investment: +18%
- Sales efficiency ratio: >1.2x

```
